description: Data warehouse analytics pipeline with three-layer security gate (quota→RLS→PII masking). T173 QueryExecutionEngine orchestrates inline quota check, RLS, and PII masking before query execution.

n1.label: ValidateQueryRequest
n1.description: Validate query syntax, tenant scope, and required fields

n2.label: RetrieveQueryPatterns
n2.description: RAG retrieval of known query optimization patterns and security gate blueprints

n3.label: DecomposeQueryPlan
n3.description: Decompose complex query into executable steps with gate ordering

n4.label: GenerateQueryExecutor
n4.description: AI generates T173 QueryExecutionEngine with correct three-layer gate: T187 quota INLINE → F422 RLS → F423 PII masking. Content: constructor inlines QuotaManager, @Inject F422 and F423 as PLATFORM-ONLY, gate order is immutable.

n5.label: ValidateSecurityGate
n5.description: Validate T187 is inline (not injected), F422/F423 cannot be disabled, gate order is correct

n6.label: ScoreQueryExecutor
n6.description: Score implementation: gate order compliance, inline service correctness, PII masking placement

n8.label: StoreFeedback
n8.description: DPO triple: chosen=T187-inline-constructor + F422-layer2 + F423-layer3-before-serialization + recordUsage-after-query, rejected=T187-@Inject OR F426-referenced OR gate-layers-reordered OR PII-masking-after-serialization. Record model used, score, gate compliance flag, inline service correctness flag.
n8.discriminatingConstraint: T187 @Inject OR F426 referenced OR gate layers reordered from T187→F422→F423 receives score=0 and triggers n3 re-iteration. Correct implementation: T187 instantiated inline in constructor at layer 1, F422 at layer 2, F423 at layer 3, all gates BEFORE executeQuery.
